Video.summary: Clouds and sea roll in toward land.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Seascape Fantasy

Video.summary: Gold, lavender and crimson surround a quiet brook.

Video.title: Crimson Oval

Video.summary: Bob uses monochromatic tones to convey the icy coldness of a silvery lake surrounded by lacy trees and bushes.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Grey Winter

Video.title: Snowfall Magic

Video.summary: Bob paints a moored fishing boat.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Dock Scene

Video.summary: Bob creates soft purple sky and tall trees that almost seem to float in the hazy foothills of a distant mountain.

Video.title: Misty Rolling Hills

Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

Video.summary: Bob paints a mountain scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain Splendor

Video.summary: A cabin in a peaceful resting place among a warm setting of lush, lakeside greenery.

Video.title: Wayside Pond

Video.summary: Bob paints a barn in winter.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Barn at Sunset

Video.summary: Guest painter Steve Ross shows how to create a mirror-like lake spanning the width of snowy peaks and foothills.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Lake by Mountain

Video.summary: Bob paints a lush island.

Video.summary: Bob paints in warm hues.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Golden Glow of Morning

Video.summary: Bob helps a timid little stream find its way to a delightful waterfall, while gazing upon a forest of elegant trees.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Misty Waterfall

Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
